---
title: "William Kane - *Personal Site*"
---

*Mathematics BSc and Risk and Uncertainty MSc Graduate*

I have a strong background in statistics and modelling. Fluent in Python, and competent in R and Julia, and Excel.

New graduate with a focus on data analysis, mathematics, statistics, and python. Looking to hit the ground running and start a career in Liverpool. Suited to data analysis roles with routes for progression. My career goal is to take responsibility for data modelling and analysis at a senior or managerial level, using the latest techniques and work‑flows, and intelligent automated systems. Keen to engage, learn, and work at a fast pace.

![](assets/linkedin.png){width=2%} LinkedIn: <https://uk.linkedin.com/in/william-kane-004436170>  
![](assets/github-mark.png){width=2%} Github: <https://github.com/tubestubes>

![](assets/python.png){width=10%} ![](assets/r.svg){width=10%} ![](assets/julia.svg.png){width=10%} ![](assets/excel.svg.png){width=10%}
